allow: PowerShell($json = Get-Content -Raw "D:\\Centrale\\Centrale Tech\\workshop_2025_2026\\Data-AI\\Workshop_6\\use_network\\Application - Réseau Profond.ipynb" | ConvertFrom-Json; $i = 0; foreach \($cell in $json.cells\) { $src = if \($cell.source -is [array]\) { \($cell.source -join ''\).Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(80, \($cell.source -join ''\).Length\)\) } else { $cell.source.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(80, $cell.source.Length\)\) }; Write-Output "$i [$\($cell.cell_type\)] id=$\($cell.id\) :: $src"; $i++ })

PowerShell($nb = Get-Content -Raw "D:\\Centrale\\Centrale Tech\\workshop_2025_2026\\Data-AI\\Workshop_6\\use_network\\Application - Réseau Profond.ipynb" | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Output "nbformat: $\($nb.nbformat\).$\($nb.nbformat_minor\)"; Write-Output "kernel: $\($nb.metadata.kernelspec.name\)"; Write-Output "first cell type: $\($nb.cells[0].cell_type\)"; Write-Output "first cell has id field: $\($nb.cells[0].PSObject.Properties['id'] -ne $null\)")

PowerShell($json = Get-Content -Raw "D:\\Centrale\\Centrale Tech\\workshop_2025_2026\\Data-AI\\Workshop_6\\use_network\\Application - Réseau Profond.ipynb" | ConvertFrom-Json; $i = 0; foreach \($cell in $json.cells\) { $src = if \($cell.source -is [array]\) { \($cell.source -join ''\) } else { $cell.source }; $preview = $src.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(90, $src.Length\)\) -replace "`n", " | "; Write-Output "$i [$\($cell.cell_type\)] :: $preview"; $i++ })

Bash(python -c "import json; nb = json.load\(open\(r'D:/Centrale/Centrale Tech/workshop_2025_2026/Data-AI/Workshop_6/use_network/Application - Réseau Profond.ipynb', encoding='utf-8'\)\); print\('OK,', len\(nb['cells']\), 'cells'\)")
